error.404.title: Page not found
error.404.description: This address does not exist in the admin panel. The link may be outdated or the record was deleted.

error.403.description: Your role has no permission for this section. Contact an administrator if you need access.

reset.invalid: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.

settings.maintenance.desc_off: Normal mode: the site is fully available to visitors.

settings.maintenance.desc_full: Site closed: visitors see a 503 stub page. The admin stays available.
settings.help.site_url: The canonical public address — used in emails, sitemap and OG markup.

settings.help.privacy.consent_enabled: Show the cookie consent banner to visitors (enable for GDPR jurisdictions).
settings.help.privacy.consent_categories: JSON list of categories with a key and a required flag; required ones can't be declined.
settings.help.privacy.consent_texts: Overrides the shipped banner texts per locale; empty uses the defaults.
settings.help.debug.enabled: SQL and timing panel for users with the settings permission.
settings.help.debug.slow_query_ms: Queries slower than this are highlighted in the Debug Bar.

jobs.list.col.title: Title
jobs.list.empty_hint: Try adjusting your filters or post a new job.
jobs.detail.title: Job
jobs.detail.applicant.name: Name
jobs.detail.apply_hint: Ready to join? Submit your application.
jobs.candidates.title: Candidates
jobs.candidates.hint: People who applied to your roles
jobs.candidates.col.name: Name
jobs.application.title: Job Application
jobs.application.cover_letter_placeholde: Tell us why you're a great fit…
jobs.application.question.motivation: Why do you want to join us?
jobs.application.done_hint: Thanks for applying — we'll be in touch soon.
jobs.new.title: New Job
jobs.new.requirements_hint: List what the ideal candidate needs.
jobs.new.field.title: Title
jobs.new.error.salary: Maximum must be greater than minimum
jobs.companies.title: Companies
jobs.companies.no_roles_hint: This company has no published positions right now.
jobs.categories.title: Job Categories
jobs.categories.col.name: Name
jobs.categories.error.slug: Use lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens
jobs.categories.delete_confirm.title: Delete category?
showcase.hub.title: Components
showcase.hub.subtitle: Every UI component in one place — the buyer's reference. Search, browse by group, open any page.
showcase.tour.title: Guided tour
showcase.base.buttons.title: Buttons
showcase.base.buttons.desc: Button variants, sizes, icon layouts and interactive states.
showcase.base.buttons.states_note: Disabled buttons are non-interactive and skipped by the keyboard; pair a spinner with disabled to signal an in-flight action.
showcase.base.alerts.title: Alerts
showcase.base.alerts.desc: Contextual feedback banners for informational, success, warning and error states.
showcase.base.alerts.status_note: Status skins are composed from --status-* tokens, never hard-coded colors.
showcase.base.alerts.dismissible_note: The close control sits in the AlertAction slot; dismissing is local UI state.
showcase.base.badges.title: Badges
showcase.base.badges.desc: Compact labels for statuses, counts and metadata.
showcase.base.badges.link_note: Use asChild to render a badge as a link while keeping its styling.
showcase.base.colors.title: Colors
showcase.base.colors.desc: The design-token palette read straight from CSS variables — swap the tokens, never the components.
showcase.base.colors.note: Every swatch reads its color from a var() — no hard-coded hex values.
showcase.base.cards.title: Cards
showcase.base.cards.desc: Grouping surfaces with header, content and footer regions across four variants.
showcase.base.cards.variants_note: Variants change only the surface ring and shadow; the layout stays identical.
showcase.base.carousel.title: Carousel
showcase.base.carousel.desc: A swipeable slider with keyboard support and previous/next controls.
showcase.base.carousel.note: Use the arrow keys to move between slides; the controls disable at the ends.
showcase.base.dropdowns.title: Dropdowns
showcase.base.dropdowns.desc: Menus triggered from a button — items, checkboxes, radio groups and sub-menus.
showcase.base.grid.title: Grid
showcase.base.grid.desc: Tailwind grid utilities for column counts, gaps and responsive spans.
showcase.base.grid.note: Spans are set per cell with col-span-* utilities.
showcase.base.images.title: Images
showcase.base.images.desc: Responsive image treatments — aspect ratios, object-fit and rounded shapes.
showcase.base.images.note: object-cover fills the box and crops; contain fits the whole image inside.
showcase.base.tabs.title: Tabs
showcase.base.tabs.desc: Switch between related views with the underline or segmented styles.
showcase.base.accordion.title: Accordion
showcase.base.accordion.desc: Collapsible sections for FAQs and dense settings — single or multiple open.
showcase.base.accordion.single_note: In single mode, opening one item collapses the others; collapsible allows all closed.
showcase.base.modals.title: Modals
showcase.base.modals.desc: Focus-trapping overlays — the Dialog primitive, the Modal shell and the ConfirmDialog.
showcase.base.modals.note: Dialogs trap focus and close on Escape or an overlay click.
showcase.base.offcanvas.title: Offcanvas
showcase.base.offcanvas.desc: Slide-over sheets and drawers anchored to any edge of the screen.
showcase.base.offcanvas.panelDesc: A slide-over surface for secondary content and quick actions.
showcase.base.offcanvas.note: Sheets trap focus and close on Escape or an overlay click; the side prop is a physical anchor and does not mirror in RTL.
showcase.base.placeholders.title: Placeholders
showcase.base.placeholders.desc: Skeleton loaders that mirror content layout while data loads.
showcase.base.placeholders.note: Skeletons are decorative; set aria-busy on the container that replaces them so assistive tech announces the loading state.
showcase.base.progress.title: Progress
showcase.base.progress.desc: Determinate progress bars and spinners for in-flight work.
showcase.base.progress.note: Progress renders a native progressbar role; provide an accessible label so screen readers announce its value.
showcase.base.notifications.title: Notifications
showcase.base.notifications.desc: Transient toast messages for feedback and system events.
showcase.base.notifications.expire: Your session is about to expire
showcase.base.notifications.note: Toasts are announced politely and dismiss automatically; keep messages short and offer an action for anything reversible.
showcase.base.media.title: Media
showcase.base.media.desc: Media object rows pairing an avatar or thumbnail with a title and text.
showcase.base.media.text: Commented on your recent update a few minutes ago.
showcase.base.media.caption: Uploaded 12 new assets to the shared library.
showcase.base.media.note: The media object keeps the media and body aligned to the top while the body column flexes to fill the remaining width.
showcase.base.video.title: Video
showcase.base.video.desc: Responsive video embeds that preserve their aspect ratio at any width.
showcase.base.video.note: AspectRatio reserves space before the media loads to prevent layout shift; swap the placeholder for an iframe or video element.
showcase.base.typography.title: Typography
showcase.base.typography.desc: The heading scale, body copy and inline text elements built on type tokens.
showcase.base.typography.lead: A lead paragraph introduces a section with slightly larger, muted text.
showcase.base.typography.para: Body copy uses the base font size with a comfortable line height for long-form reading throughout the admin.
showcase.base.typography.small: Small print for captions and secondary notes.
showcase.base.typography.quote: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works.
showcase.base.typography.note: Headings use the heading font token and step down from h1 to h6 on a consistent type scale.
showcase.base.lists.title: Lists
showcase.base.lists.desc: Unordered, ordered, description and divided list patterns.
showcase.base.lists.note: Divided lists separate rows with a token border instead of bullets, ideal for navigation and settings.
showcase.base.links.title: Links
showcase.base.links.desc: Anchor and link styles for navigation and inline references.
showcase.base.links.note: Links inherit color from their variant and reveal an underline on hover and focus for a clear affordance.
showcase.base.general.title: General
showcase.base.general.desc: A gallery of small utility elements: separators, keyboard keys, tooltips and avatars.
showcase.base.general.note: These primitives compose into toolbars, menus and help surfaces throughout the template.
showcase.base.ribbons.title: Ribbons
showcase.base.ribbons.desc: Corner and edge ribbons layered over cards to flag status.
showcase.base.ribbons.cardDesc: A short supporting description for the card content.
showcase.base.ribbons.note: Ribbons are absolutely positioned over a relatively positioned card; keep them out of the accessibility tree or label them clearly.
showcase.base.utilities.title: Utilities
showcase.base.utilities.desc: Design-token swatches for radius, shadow, spacing and border width.
showcase.base.utilities.note: Every value maps to a Tailwind token, so components stay consistent when the theme radius or spacing scale changes.
showcase.advance.sweetAlerts.title: Sweet Alerts
showcase.advance.sweetAlerts.desc: SweetAlert-style confirmation, success and warning modals, built on the shared AlertDialog and ConfirmDialog primitives.
showcase.advance.sweetAlerts.confirmText: It will be visible to everyone immediately.
showcase.advance.sweetAlerts.warningText: You have used 92% of your plan quota.
showcase.advance.sweetAlerts.deleteText: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
showcase.advance.sweetAlerts.note: Every destructive action routes through ConfirmDialog; confirming fires a toast.
showcase.advance.nestableList.title: Nestable List
showcase.advance.nestableList.desc: A nested drag-and-drop list. Drag a row up or down to reorder it, or sideways to change its nesting depth.
showcase.advance.nestableList.note: Drag the grip handle vertically to reorder, or horizontally to nest and un-nest. Full keyboard support is built in.
showcase.advance.scrollbar.title: Scrollbar
showcase.advance.scrollbar.desc: Styled scroll containers built on the ScrollArea primitive, with token borders and thin custom thumbs.
showcase.advance.scrollbar.wideRow: Wide row {n} — scroll horizontally to see more
showcase.advance.scrollbar.note: ScrollArea renders custom thumbs over native overflow, so scrolling stays accessible on every platform.
showcase.advance.animation.title: Animation
showcase.advance.animation.desc: Utility-class animations from tw-animate-css applied to a token box — entrance effects and looping attention effects.
showcase.advance.animation.note: Entrance effects replay on click via a re-mount key; looping effects toggle on and off.
showcase.advance.tour.title: Tour
showcase.advance.tour.desc: A coach-mark walkthrough that spotlights real elements on the page, one step at a time.
showcase.advance.tour.step1Text: This button starts the guided tour. Follow along to learn the workspace.
showcase.advance.tour.step2Text: Group and reorder your content here to keep projects tidy.
showcase.advance.tour.step3Text: Adjust preferences and defaults from this panel whenever you need.
showcase.advance.tour.hint: Press Escape or click outside to skip the tour at any time.
showcase.advance.tour.note: Steps target elements by CSS selector; the open state is controlled from the page.
showcase.advance.swiperSlider.title: Swiper / Slider
showcase.advance.swiperSlider.desc: Carousels built on the shadcn Carousel (Embla) primitive — a looped slider and a multi-per-view variant.
showcase.advance.swiperSlider.note: This template ships the shadcn Carousel (Embla under the hood), not Swiper. It supports loop, alignment and keyboard navigation.
showcase.advance.ratings.title: Ratings
showcase.advance.ratings.desc: The Rating primitive — read-only display, interactive input with keyboard and hover, and three sizes.
showcase.advance.ratings.label: Rating
showcase.advance.ratings.note: Interactive ratings support arrow keys, Home and End, plus a hover preview.
showcase.advance.highlight.title: Highlight
showcase.advance.highlight.desc: The Highlight utility wraps every case-insensitive match of a search query in a token-styled mark.
showcase.advance.highlight.note: Matching runs on React text nodes only — never dangerouslySetInnerHTML — so it is safe against HTML injection.
showcase.advance.scrollspy.title: ScrollSpy
showcase.advance.scrollspy.desc: The useScrollSpy hook tracks which section is in view and highlights its anchor in the navigation.
showcase.advance.scrollspy.body: Scroll the panel to watch the active anchor update automatically as each section enters the viewport.
showcase.advance.scrollspy.note: Anchors reflect the section in view via IntersectionObserver; click one to scroll its section into view.
showcase.forms.basicElements.title: Basic Elements
showcase.forms.basicElements.desc: Text inputs, textareas and labels wrapped in FormField — sizes, states and inline errors.
showcase.forms.basicElements.nameHelp: As it appears on your ID.
showcase.forms.basicElements.sizesNote: Inputs and textareas share one size scale: sm (32px), default (38px) and lg (42px).
showcase.forms.basicElements.errorNote: Passing an error to FormField sets aria-invalid on the control and links the message for assistive tech.
showcase.forms.formSelect.title: Select
showcase.forms.formSelect.desc: Dropdown select with sizes, grouped options and disabled items.
showcase.forms.formSelect.disabledNote: Disable a single item to keep it visible but unselectable, or disable the whole trigger.
showcase.forms.checksRadios.title: Checkboxes & Radios
showcase.forms.checksRadios.desc: Checkboxes, radio groups and switches across their checked, indeterminate and disabled states.
showcase.forms.checksRadios.rowNote: SwitchRow makes the whole row a label, so a tap anywhere toggles the switch.
showcase.forms.checksRadios.twofaHint: Require a one-time code on sign-in.
showcase.forms.pickers.title: Pickers
showcase.forms.pickers.desc: Date, date-range and colour pickers — all controlled through state.
showcase.forms.pickers.dateNote: Values round-trip as ISO strings (YYYY-MM-DD); the calendar follows the active locale.
showcase.forms.pickers.colorNote: The swatch and hex field stay in sync; an invalid hex marks the field.
showcase.forms.inputMasks.title: Input Masks
showcase.forms.inputMasks.desc: Formatted inputs for card number, expiry, phone and amount.
showcase.forms.inputMasks.cardNote: Digits are grouped in fours as you type; unmask() returns the raw number for submit.
showcase.forms.inputMasks.amountNote: Groups thousands and keeps up to eight decimals for crypto-scale amounts.
showcase.forms.advanced.title: Advanced Inputs
showcase.forms.advanced.desc: Tag-style multi-select and a searchable single-value combobox.
showcase.forms.advanced.tagsNote: Selected options render as removable chips; the value is an array of keys.
showcase.forms.advanced.comboNote: Type to filter; the list narrows and Enter selects the highlighted item.
showcase.forms.rangeSlider.title: Range Slider
showcase.forms.rangeSlider.desc: Single-thumb and range sliders with steps and a disabled state.
showcase.forms.rangeSlider.rangeNote: Two values give two thumbs; the step snaps both to 50-unit increments.
showcase.forms.rangeSlider.stepsNote: A step of 1 snaps the thumb to whole values between the min and max.
showcase.forms.validation.title: Validation
showcase.forms.validation.desc: A live React Hook Form + Zod form with inline, per-field errors.
showcase.forms.validation.name: Full name
showcase.forms.validation.note: Errors come from the Zod schema and render inline under each field, never as a toast.
showcase.forms.wizard.title: Wizard
showcase.forms.wizard.desc: Multi-step flows with the Stepper indicator and the shared wizard dialog.
showcase.forms.wizard.stepperNote: The Stepper is a controlled indicator — drive activeStep with your own next/prev state.
showcase.forms.wizard.dialogNote: WizardDialog is the standard modal step shell; Finish fires onFinish and closes.
showcase.forms.wizard.done: All steps complete — ready to finish.
showcase.forms.wizard.confirmHint: Review your choices, then finish to create the project.
showcase.forms.editors.title: Editors
showcase.forms.editors.desc: Rich-text and code editors, both controlled through state.
showcase.forms.editors.richNote: TipTap-backed HTML editor; onChange emits sanitized HTML.
showcase.forms.editors.codeNote: CodeMirror editor with HTML/CSS/JS highlighting, loaded lazily.
showcase.forms.fileUploads.title: File Uploads
showcase.forms.fileUploads.desc: A drag-and-drop dropzone that lists selected files. Demo only — nothing is uploaded.
showcase.forms.fileUploads.hint: Drag & drop files here, or click to browse
showcase.forms.fileUploads.limits: Any file type — this demo never leaves the browser
showcase.forms.fileUploads.note: Static demo: files are listed by name and size only; no reading, upload or network happens.
showcase.forms.formLayouts.title: Form Layouts
showcase.forms.formLayouts.desc: Horizontal, inline and grid arrangements built from the FormField primitive.
showcase.forms.formLayouts.horizontalNot: A grid className puts the label beside the control from the sm breakpoint up.
showcase.forms.formLayouts.inlineNote: Fields flow in a single wrapping row — ideal for compact filter bars.
showcase.forms.formLayouts.gridNote: A two-column grid; wide fields span both columns with col-span-2.
showcase.forms.select2.title: Select2
showcase.forms.select2.desc: Searchable single and multiple selection — the modern replacement for Select2.
showcase.forms.select2.singleNote: A searchable single-value combobox; type to filter the list.
showcase.forms.select2.multiNote: A searchable multi-select; picks render as removable chips.
showcase.widgets.title: Widgets
showcase.widgets.desc: Dashboard widget archetypes — stat, chart, list and status cards across size tiers.
showcase.widgets.archetypes_desc: The four widget renderers on one responsive grid.
showcase.widgets.sizes_note: Size is a content tier, not just a width: the same widget shows more at md, lg and xl.
showcase.widgets.states_note: Every widget card renders its own loading skeleton, error retry and empty state.
showcase.tables.col.name: Name
showcase.tables.basic.title: Basic Tables
showcase.tables.basic.desc: The raw table primitive with header, body, footer and caption in plain, striped and bordered layouts.
showcase.tables.basic.footer_note: A footer row sums the columns; the caption names the table for screen readers.
showcase.tables.gridjs.title: Sortable Table
showcase.tables.gridjs.desc: A table with client-side column sorting driven by local state.
showcase.tables.gridjs.note: Design-token replacement for Grid.js — click a header to sort ascending or descending.
showcase.tables.listjs.title: Searchable List
showcase.tables.listjs.desc: A searchable, paginated list built from an input filter and the pagination bar.
showcase.tables.listjs.note: Design-token replacement for List.js — search filters rows and resets to the first page.
showcase.tables.datatables.title: Data Tables
showcase.tables.datatables.desc: The full data table: sortable columns, search filter, row selection and pagination.
showcase.tables.datatables.note: Built on TanStack Table over local static rows — the standard way to render admin lists.
showcase.charts.line.title: Line
showcase.charts.line.desc: Line charts trace one or more series as a continuous stroke over a shared axis.
showcase.charts.area.title: Area
showcase.charts.area.desc: Area charts fill the region under a line to emphasise volume and cumulative totals.
showcase.charts.column.title: Column
showcase.charts.column.desc: Vertical bars comparing a value across categories or time buckets.
showcase.charts.bar.title: Bar
showcase.charts.bar.desc: Horizontal bars for ranking categories and stacked part-to-whole comparisons.
showcase.charts.mixed.title: Mixed
showcase.charts.mixed.desc: Combine bars with a line or area in a single plot to relate two metrics.
showcase.charts.timeline.title: Timeline
showcase.charts.timeline.desc: A continuous time series over dated buckets, as an area or multi-line trend.
showcase.charts.rangeArea.title: Range area
showcase.charts.rangeArea.desc: A shaded band between a lower and upper bound, optionally with a mean line.
showcase.charts.funnel.title: Funnel
showcase.charts.funnel.desc: Stage-to-stage drop-off, each step scaled to the widest with a conversion rate.
showcase.charts.candlestick.title: Candlestick
showcase.charts.candlestick.desc: Open-high-low-close price bars with coloured up and down bodies.
showcase.charts.boxplot.title: Box plot
showcase.charts.boxplot.desc: Five-number summaries — minimum, quartiles, median and maximum — per category.
showcase.charts.boxplot.note: The box spans the interquartile range (Q1–Q3); the inner line marks the median and the whiskers reach the minimum and maximum.
showcase.charts.bubble.title: Bubble
showcase.charts.bubble.desc: A scatter plot where a third value drives each marker's size.
showcase.charts.scatter.title: Scatter
showcase.charts.scatter.desc: Scatter and bubble plots for correlation and distribution, colored from the chart palette.
showcase.charts.scatter.bubbleNote: The Z axis maps a third dimension to point size, turning a scatter plot into a bubble chart.
showcase.charts.heatmap.title: Heatmap
showcase.charts.heatmap.desc: A grid heatmap whose cell intensity maps a value onto a single chart-palette token.
showcase.charts.heatmap.note: Cell color is mixed from a chart token via color-mix, so the grid stays on-palette in light and dark.
showcase.charts.treemap.title: Treemap
showcase.charts.treemap.desc: Nested rectangles sized by value; tiles cycle the chart palette to encode each item's share.
showcase.charts.pie.title: Pie
showcase.charts.pie.desc: Pie and donut charts for part-to-whole breakdowns, with slices from the chart palette.
showcase.charts.pie.donutNote: A donut is a pie with an inner radius, leaving room for a total or legend at the center.
showcase.charts.radialbar.title: Radial Bar
showcase.charts.radialbar.desc: Circular bar tracks and a single-value progress gauge, colored from the chart palette.
showcase.charts.radialbar.gaugeNote: A single track with a capped angle reads as a progress gauge; the value drives the arc's end angle.
showcase.charts.radar.title: Radar
showcase.charts.radar.desc: Radar (spider) charts comparing several metrics on a shared polar grid.
showcase.charts.polarArea.title: Polar Area
showcase.charts.polarArea.desc: A Nightingale rose chart: equal-angle sectors whose radius encodes each value.
showcase.charts.polarArea.note: Every sector spans the same angle; the radius — not the arc — carries the value.
showcase.charts.slope.title: Slope
showcase.charts.slope.desc: Two-point slope charts that make the change between two periods easy to read.
showcase.charts.slope.note: Each line connects a before and after point, so rising and falling series stand out at a glance.
showcase.charts.chartjs.title: Chart.js
showcase.charts.chartjs.desc: Chart.js chart types rendered with the template's Recharts compositions.
showcase.charts.chartjs.substitution: This template ships Recharts, not Chart.js. The charts below render the equivalent Chart.js types (line, bar, doughnut) with our shared Recharts components on the chart palette.
showcase.charts.echarts.title: ECharts
showcase.charts.echarts.desc: ECharts chart types rendered with the template's Recharts compositions.
showcase.charts.echarts.substitution: This template ships Recharts, not Apache ECharts. The charts below render the equivalent ECharts types (area, bar, treemap) with our shared Recharts components on the chart palette.
showcase.charts.substitutionNote: Rendered with Recharts — the charting library this template ships with.
showcase.icons.title: Icons
showcase.icons.desc: The lucide icon set — the template's single icon library. Click a tile to copy its name. We do not ship Velzon's icon fonts (Remix, Boxicons, Material, Feather, Line Awesome, Crypto SVG).
showcase.multiLevel.one.title: Level 1.1
showcase.multiLevel.one.desc: A page two levels deep in the sidebar.
showcase.multiLevel.two.title: Level 2.1
showcase.multiLevel.two.desc: A page three levels deep in the sidebar.
showcase.multiLevel.note: The sidebar renders arbitrarily deep nested menus; these pages are the leaf destinations.
showcase.maps.base.title: Base map
showcase.maps.base.desc: A plain Leaflet map on free OpenStreetMap tiles — no API key required.
showcase.maps.tileNote: Tiles © OpenStreetMap contributors. Leaflet is BSD-2-Clause licensed — safe to redistribute.
showcase.maps.markers.title: Markers & choropleth
showcase.maps.markers.desc: Token-styled markers with popups, plus graduated circles standing in for a choropleth layer.
showcase.maps.markers.choroplethNote: Circle radius and fill intensity map to a value via the --chart-* tokens — a lightweight choropleth stand-in.
showcase.maps.substitution.title: Vector / Google → Leaflet
showcase.maps.substitution.desc: Why the template ships Leaflet instead of vector or Google maps.
showcase.maps.substitution.note: One mapping library keeps the bundle small and the license clean.
showcase.maps.substitution.body: Velzon ships vector maps and Google Maps; this template standardizes on Leaflet (BSD-2-Clause), which is resale-safe and needs no API key. Every map page renders the Leaflet equivalent.
